nodes.context: English organized crime family based in Manchester, involved in murders, robberies, and nightclub security.
Manchester gang involved in forging links with the Noonan family.
Manchester gang involved in forging links with the Noonan family.
Manchester gangs with which the Noonan family had little involvement.
Another Manchester gang involved in gang truces.

edges.evidence_quote: Damian and Desmond Noonan were forging links with other notable Manchester gangs including the Cheetham Hill and Salford gangs.
edges.context: The Noonan family forged links with the Cheetham Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Damian and Desmond Noonan were forging links with other notable Manchester gangs including the Cheetham Hill and Salford gangs.
edges.context: The Noonan family forged links with the Salford gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: The Noonan family tended to have nothing to do with the Moss Side gangs
edges.context: The Noonan family had no involvement with Moss Side gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: Other gangland figures participating in this truce were Paul Massey, Damian Noonan, Paul Flannery and apparently Jimmy 'the Weed' Donnelly, who was a prominent figure in the Quality Street Gang, another Manchester gang.
edges.context: The Noonan family participated in a truce that included the Quality Street Gang.
